data.name: Place ad for technical team gumtree (LinkedIn done)
data.notes:
Technician for smart home company.

We are looking for a technician to install the following systems for projects in the Western Cape:
    CCTV
    Audiovisuals
    Networks
    Smart lighting
    Access control

The candidates need to have experience installing and configuring these systems. As well as cabling for them and building racks.

Other useful experience includes IT installations and working on building sites. 

The candidate needs to have a valid ID, drivers license, a clear police record.

data.notes:
Currently, we have 3 people logging time against the budgets in harvest projects. So we are effectively logging 3 hours of time on site against 1 hour of quoted time budgeted. 

Please see if there is a way to have installation time logged so that each technician accounts for half of the budgeted hour. Since we bill for a team of 2 technicians. 

This might be in the billable amount allocated to each technician (should be R700/2 not R700). Or if it's strictly time against time we might be stuck.

data.name: Service cost Salary / 130 hours = cost
data.notes:
Service companies take the cost rate and x3.
    Salary
    Opex
    Margin +-20% net

People need to be PROFITABLE.

    the ratio of 3 for making your time based people profitable:
        For most service based and people resourced business there exists a safe rule of thumb that states the salary cost of a person should be a third of the sales that that person produces. This is the same for the entire company salary bill vs. the total company sales.

data.notes: Harvest is giving me data on Melissa's work now. Synced with Asana, I'm getting awesome data. Mands pulled it into Excel and we got graphs to see where her energy is going.

data.name: Weekly winning report
data.notes:
Submit this report weekly by the end of Friday. 

This will be used to track your KPIs and scorecard.

If you attain a suitable score for this by the end of the year, you will move from installer and team leader, to project manager next year. 

Each of these subtasks represents 1 point.

So you will get a score out of 5 per week. There are 100 points up for grabs.
